frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal nikah bhi aadmi ke liye risk ho gaya hai. Agar aurat ka dil badal gaya toh maintenance, 498A, sab laga deti hai, aur mard saalon court ke chakkar kaatta rehta hai. Isliye main toh har young ladke ko bolta hoon, shaadi se pehle sab clear rakho, warna baad mein reverse dowry deni padti hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially exploitative and frames legal protections like 498A and maintenance as tools women use against men. It encodes victimhood inversion, 498A misuse rhetoric, and the 'reverse dowry' framing.
original_frame: Motherhood as Basis of Respect, Women Defined by Male Relations
persona_text: You are Mohammed. Age 48. Married. A Muslim man in Hyderabad. Your 26 year old daughter Sana has told you and your wife that she and her husband have decided to wait at least three more years before having children because they both want to establish their careers first. You are sitting with your wife after Sana has left. You are telling your wife what you think of this decision and what it means about the kind of wife Sana is and what Islam says about a woman's role in marriage and why you think Sana's husband is not guiding her correctly.
